verdict_notes: MVP demo (Notepad open + type) works end-to-end in mock mode with mock GUI. Backend + frontend tests pass. Agent-S3 integration is armoured but not loaded into the WorkflowRunner (INT-001). Tauri bundle cannot be verified in this environment (no Rust). Docs are partially outdated (3 mismatches). All critical safety guarantees hold: tool whitelist enforced, permission gate fires before risky tools, Agent-S3 translator rejects all 11 malicious patterns tested, no exec/eval/os.system anywhere in backend Python. Recommend Phase 11 closeout commit + Phase 12 runner integration + doc fixes; not blockers for MVP demo.
